tool_args.label: Toll Increase Implemented Jan 2026

payload.subject: MTA Bridges and Tunnels toll rates

tool_args.label: Vehicle Toll Revenue Unfavorable Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Unfavorable variance is due to lower traffic resulting from inclement winter weather

tool_args.label: Overtime Unfavorable Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Unfavorability primarily caused by inclement winter weather

tool_args.label: CBD Tolling Revenue Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: Higher toll revenue driven by lower Bad Debt reserve and higher than forecast fee revenue

tool_args.label: CBD Tolling Expense Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: Overall expenses are favorable to Adopted Budget, driven by lower costs for maintenance, debt collection, and legal fees, partially offset by higher labor expenses, and higher credit card processing fees which is due to timing.

tool_args.label: MTA B&T Toll Increase Effective January 4, 2026
Preliminary results subject to audit review

payload.gap_text: Results are preliminary and subject to audit review. Differences are due to rounding.
payload.description: Multiple pages note that financial results are preliminary and subject to audit review

tool_args.label: Current month actuals do not include post-close adjustments

payload.gap_text: the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results
payload.description: Results based on preliminary close of general ledger, subject to review and adjustment
